title: iris italica var. cengialti
intro: Iris italica var. cengialti, also known as the Sicilian iris, is a plant species belonging to the iris family and is native to Italy. The medicinal properties of Iris italica var. cengialti lie in its ability to stimulate digestion, ease respiratory issues, and act as a mild laxative. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing stomach problems, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, Iris italica var. cengialti is prepared as a tincture or infused in hot water to create a tea for its medicinal purposes.
